notes: Created Cloudflare Pages deployment surface for project netraverse-com. Production domain still serves Namecheap parking before Pages deploy and DNS cutover.
Cloudflare Pages project netraverse-com is live and browser-QA passed on pages.dev. www.netraverse.com still returns Namecheap Parking/1.0 until DNS/nameserver cutover.
Cloudflare DNS is staged. Registrar still needs nameserver cutover from dns1/dns2.registrar-servers.com to Cloudflare before www.netraverse.com can serve Pages.

Cloudflare zone and Pages custom domains are active. OpenClaw Chromium production QA passed. Apex redirects to www via Cloudflare Redirect Rule. Local Mac resolver showed intermittent stale 198.18.* parking cache immediately after cutover; authoritative DNS and Cloudflare IP-directed probes pass.

Deployed SEO redirect update through Cloudflare Pages direct upload from a temporary staged artifact because this SSD workspace lacks node_modules/.bin/next. Staged artifact synced updated static files and homepage SEO head output; run full npm build in an approved dependency environment on next release.

De-dup 4 alias collision pairs (vscode<-vs-code, figma<-figma-linux, steam<-steam-games, seven-zip<-p7zip) via overlay redirectTo tombstones + Cloudflare 301s. Manual wrangler-direct upload from OpenClaw; preview dedup-preview verified before promoting to production main.

First GitHub Actions CI/CD deploy after pushing main to public 7-labs/netraverse-next and setting repo secrets. cloudflare-pages.yml now auto-builds+deploys on push to main; this run redeployed the same dedup artifact. Establishes CI/CD as the canonical path; wrangler-direct from OpenClaw remains manual fallback. wrangler-action@v3 Node20 deprecation warning is non-blocking.
